ValidationRule.description: An Escalated AFM Case must carry a substantive severity justification (>=10 chars). Scoped to the Fleet_Operations record type so non-AFM Cases are unaffected.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, "Escalated"), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Fleet_Operations", OR( ISBLANK(AFM_Severity_Justification__c), LEN(AFM_Severity_Justification__c) < 10 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Severity Justification is required (≥10 chars) when escalating an AFM Case.
